title: Aranet Seasonal Baseline Comparison for HVAC Efficiency
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-400d
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, ""))
| eval m=month(_time)
| eval season=case(m=1 OR m=2 OR m=12,"winter", m=6 OR m=7 OR m=8,"summer", 1=1,"shoulder")
| stats avg(temp) as avg_indoor by season location
description: Comparing shoulder, summer, and winter indoor profiles shows drift in economizer or reheat strategy effectiveness.
value: Quantifies retrofit ROI and flags stuck dampers seasonally.
implementation: (1) Align UTC to building timezone. (2) Control for occupancy using CO2 gate. (3) Export to sustainability reporting.
grandmaExplanation: We compare indoor comfort across seasons to see if heating and cooling stay efficient.
